title: Add Case Studies / Social Proof Section with Real Metrics
problem: Site mentions Fortune 500 clients but lacks dedicated case studies with concrete outcomes. Social proof badges are text-only placeholders.
approach: Create /case-studies page with 3-4 case studies. Add real client logos. Add testimonial carousel.
why_build: Social proof is the #1 conversion driver for consultancy websites — prospects need to see proven results before booking a call.

title: Implement Lead Capture with Nurture Sequence
problem: Only contact form exists. No lead magnet, no email capture, no automated nurture sequence.
approach: Add email capture with lead magnet. Integrate with email service. Set up automated nurture sequence.
why_build: A single contact form captures only bottom-of-funnel visitors — a lead magnet + nurture captures the other 97%.

title: Add Interactive ROI Calculator
problem: No interactive elements that demonstrate value. Prospects can't estimate their potential ROI.
approach: Build ROI calculator with inputs (employees, hourly rate, hours/week). Output: annual savings, payback period.
why_build: ROI calculators are proven conversion tools — they let prospects self-qualify and build an internal business case.

title: SEO Improvements: Structured Data, Dynamic Sitemap, Blog Schema
problem: Sitemap is static XML. No Article schema, no FAQ schema, no BreadcrumbList.
approach: Generate sitemap dynamically. Add Article structured data. Add FAQPage schema. Replace Calendly with next/script.
why_build: Structured data and dynamic sitemaps are table stakes for organic discovery — without them, SignalHaus is invisible to search.

title: Add Animations, Micro-Interactions, and Visual Polish
problem: Site is clean but static. For premium consultancy, feels like template.
approach: Add Framer Motion for scroll-triggered animations. Add gradient mesh to hero. Replace placeholder with real headshot.
why_build: Premium positioning demands premium presentation — a static site undermines trust for enterprise rates.

title: Implement Pricing Page with Clear Tiers
problem: No dedicated pricing page. Service pricing is unclear.
approach: Create /pricing page with tiered packages. Include what's included, timeline, ROI guarantee.
why_build: Clear pricing tiers pre-qualify leads and reduce friction — prospects who see pricing and still book are more likely to convert.

title: Add Services Deep-Dive Pages
problem: Services listed on homepage but no dedicated pages with detailed descriptions.
approach: Create individual pages for each service. Include case study teasers.
why_build: Individual service pages serve dual purpose: SEO landing pages AND prospect self-selection.

title: Add Webhooks for Contact Form
problem: Contact form submits to Resend but no webhook for tracking or follow-up actions.
approach: Add webhook on form submission. Track in analytics. Trigger Slack notification. Enable CRM integration.
why_build: Without webhooks, every lead is a dead-end — no analytics attribution, no instant alerts, no CRM tracking.

title: Implement Blog as Scalable Content System with MDX
problem: Blog has single hardcoded article. Each post requires new page.tsx. No RSS, tags.
approach: Migrate to MDX with frontmatter. Add dynamic [slug] routing, tag filtering, RSS feed.
why_build: A scalable blog is the long-term organic traffic engine, but only pays off with consistent content production.

title: Add Team Page and About Section
problem: Only founder placeholder 'NS' exists. No team page or company story.
approach: Add team page with roles and photos. Add company story/About page.
why_build: Team/about page builds trust, but case studies and ROI proof carry more weight for conversion.
